calendar.matters:
Suspension Of Trustee For Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar Aug-21-2013 Off Calendar

Petition Under Probate Code Section 17200 For Court Order For Partial Distribution Of Trust To Beneficiaries And For Part Payment Of Attorneys Fees To Attorneys For Trustee And Each Beneficiary
Off Calendar Aug-21-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Taylor for and with Patricia Lane. Sara Taylor for and with Wardell Lane. Jacqueline Lane in Propria Persona.

Mr. Taylor informed the Court that they have a global settlement with everything signed, that he has a Petition for Approval of the Settlement Agreement and that all Parties have signed waivers of notice of the petition. After speaking with the Probate Examiner, the Court will allow electronic filing of a drop off Ex Parte Application for Approval of the Settlement Agreement with all waivers. Counsel is to drop off courtesy copies and a proposed order directly to the Courtroom Clerk. All matters (Petition for Partial Distribution/Suspension of Trustee/Petition for Removal) will remain on calendar pending approval of the settlement agreement.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Loos. (Not Reported)
